problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
